title: RPi Debian 13.3 Trixie, Python 3.13, meshcore-cli connection issues

messages.author: Ruud
messages.text: I try to run a python script for path analysis on RPi Debian 13.3 Trixie, Python 3.13 and meshcore-cli. I experience connection issues over BLE as well as USB with a Heltec V4 companion node. Any known issues in this configuration? It runs just fine on Windows 11, Python 3.12.
messages.content_html: I try to run a python script for path analysis on RPi Debian 13.3 Trixie, Python 3.13 and meshcore-cli. I experience connection issues over BLE as well as USB with a Heltec V4 companion node. Any known issues in this configuration? It runs just fine on Windows 11, Python 3.12.

messages.author: Ruud
messages.text: rka@meshcore-pi:~ $ meshcore-cli -D -a 88:56:A6:96:41:79 DEBUG Connecting with client: None, address: 88:56:A6:96:41:79, device: None DEBUG Connecting using provided address INFO BLE Connection started DEBUG Connected successfully: 88:56:A6:96:41:79 DEBUG Sending appstart command DEBUG Sending raw data: bytearray(b'\x01\x03 mccli') DEBUG Dispatching event: EventType.CONNECTED, {'connection_info': '88:56:A6:96:41:79'}, {} DEBUG BLE device disconnected: 88:56:A6:96:41:79 (is_connected: False) DEBUG Connection lost: ble_disconnect DEBUG Dispatching event: EventType.DISCONNECTED, {'reason': 'ble_disconnect', 'reconnect_failed': False}, {} DEBUG Command error: ERROR No response from meshcore node, disconnecting rka@meshcore-pi:~ $
messages.content_html: rka@meshcore-pi:~ $ meshcore-cli -D -a 88:56:A6:96:41:79 DEBUGConnecting with client: None, address: 88:56:A6:96:41:79, device: None DEBUGConnecting using provided address INFOBLE Connection started DEBUGConnected successfully: 88:56:A6:96:41:79 DEBUGSending appstart command DEBUGSending raw data: bytearray(b'\x01\x03 mccli') DEBUGDispatching event: EventType.CONNECTED, {'connection_info': '88:56:A6:96:41:79'}, {} DEBUGBLE device disconnected: 88:56:A6:96:41:79 (is_connected: False) DEBUGConnection lost: ble_disconnect DEBUGDispatching event: EventType.DISCONNECTED, {'reason': 'ble_disconnect', 'reconnect_failed': False}, {} DEBUGCommand error: ERRORNo response from meshcore node, disconnecting rka@meshcore-pi:~ $

messages.author: Ruud
messages.text: BlueZ: 5.82, Kernel: 6.12.82, meshcore-cli: 1.4.2, firmware on Heltec v4: companion v1.40.0
